'''âg-d-dh-f''' ('''kagadhefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaunce|vaunce]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-d-dh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaunce|vaunce]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-d-dh-f
|-
! Lemma
| kagadhefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigadhefoko|thigadhefoko]] || [[word:jigadhefoko|jigadhefoko]] || [[word:shigadhefoko|shigadhefoko]] || [[word:kigadhefoko|kigadhefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugadhefoko|thuthugadhefoko]] || [[word:jujugadhefoko|jujugadhefoko]] || [[word:shushugadhefoko|shushugadhefoko]] || [[word:kukugadhefoko|kukugadhefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogadhefoko|thogadhefoko]] || [[word:jogadhefoko|jogadhefoko]] || [[word:shogadhefoko|shogadhefoko]] || [[word:kogadhefoko|kogadhefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgadhefoko|thĂŠgadhefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠgadhefoko|jĂŠgadhefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠgadhefoko|shĂŠgadhefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠgadhefoko|kĂŠgadhefoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagadhefoko|thagadhefoko]] || [[word:jagadhefoko|jagadhefoko]] || [[word:shagadhefoko|shagadhefoko]] || [[word:kagadhefoko|kagadhefoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
